back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Restrict CORS origins to specific trusted domains instead of allowing all.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Changed @CrossOrigin(origins = "*") to specific localhost and Vercel URLs.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Replace unbounded list retrieval with paginated and filtered results.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: Replaced getAllPatrimonios() with listar() accepting Pageable and filter params.

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Enforce role-based access control for sensitive operations like deletion.
Replace Spring HATEOAS RepresentationModel inheritance with java.io.Serializable to remove REST link generation dependency from the entity.
Rename the unique identifier field from numeroEtiqueta to etiqueta.
back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.human_impl: private String numeroEtiqueta -> private String etiqueta

back-end/src/main/java/com/example/schmi.general_idea: Add a new setor field to the model.
Add a new status field with a default value of 'ativo'.
Add a new valor field of type BigDecimal to the model.

back-end/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 4.0.2 to 3.4.3 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and modern Spring features.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation standards.
Add spring-boot-starter-web to enable web MVC capabilities, replacing the removed webmvc starter.
Set Maven compiler source and target to 21 to ensure Java 21 bytecode generation.
